creator: fbsdbugs@arveex.eu
text:
Ok, must have had a typo last night as I played with the conf.

Setting `iface mtu` to 1492 does indeed fix the problem with the unmodified _14.

_14 with `set iface mtu 1492` or _13 or my_modified_14 w/o any mtu setting in .conf:

tun0: flags=88d1<UP,POINTOPOINT,RUNNING,NOARP,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1492

_14 w/o setting any mtu in .conf:

tun0: flags=88d1<UP,POINTOPOINT,RUNNING,NOARP,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500


create bundle static B1
set bundle enable ipv6cp
set iface name tun0
set iface route default
set iface enable tcpmssfix

set iface disable on-demand
set iface idle 0

set iface mtu 1492 # <-----

create link static L1 pppoe
set link action bundle B1 
set link disable multilink
set link disable chap pap
set link accept pap  
set link max-redial 0    
set link keep-alive 10 60
set pppoe iface igc3
set pppoe service ""
set auth authname [...]
open
